platforms.chatgpt: Vertical 50/50 Split Full-Body Fitness Transformation Editorial for a strength-coaching brand titled BEFORE · AFTER TRANSFORM. Wardrobe: [OUTFIT]. Left half: softer athletic-tan #C89872 pre-transformation physique, lower muscle definition, relaxed posture. Right half: lean muscular post-transformation physique, vascular forearms, defined shoulders, visible highlight-sweat-gold #E8C880 sheen, strong squared stance. Setting: [SETTING]. Composition: vertical 50/50 split, body Centred 50% x 55% y, hero vertical, Eye-Level 0°, hands relaxed at sides, gaze direct to camera. Typography: 'BEFORE' left and 'AFTER' right in Oswald Bold 52pt, warm-white fill, 120 tracking. Camera: Canon R5 · 50mm f/5.6 · 1/160s · ISO 200. Lighting: Studio Strobe Two-Light — 4×6ft octabox camera-right 45° elevation 2.2m (key), 4×6ft softbox camera-left 30° elevation 2.4m half-power (fill), 1×4ft strip rim camera-back-right 30° grazing lat and tricep (rim), 4×4ft black flag below front to deepen abdomen shadow. Material physics: skin subsurface, sebum sheen, sweat micro-beads, muscle topology light pooling, stretch-short matte weave. Color grade: Capture One Neutral-00 LUT grain 4 +0.0 EV. Palette: gym-backdrop-charcoal 28%, athletic-tan 22%, shorts-black 20%, highlight-sweat-gold 16%, accent-energy-lime 14%. References: Gymshark campaign, Men's Health cover, Peter Lueders fitness. Exclude: harsh flash, plastic skin, AI hallucination artifacts, cropped extremities, text distortion.

Material physics: flat vector fills, halftone dot grain, paper fibre tooth sub-surface. References: Victor Moscoso Fillmore poster, Wes Wilson, Milton Glaser Dylan. Exclude: corporate, minimalist, cold, cluttered, grayscale.

platforms.chatgpt: Before-After Diagonal Split Furniture Campaign for [BRAND] atelier portfolio. Layout: diagonal split from top-left to bottom-right, top-left half = weathered antique side chair with flaking weathered-grey-paint #8A847A, torn webbing, attic-dust-beige #D8CCB6 dust layer in a shadowed attic corner, bottom-right half = fully restored refinished chair with restored-walnut-varnish #5A3A1E gleaming frame, plush upholstery-emerald #2E5A44 velvet seat, studio-cream-bg #F0E8D4 seamless behind. No face. Identical chair silhouette, identical frame tilt. Composition: diagonal division at 45°, hero horizontal, Eye-Level 0°, chair centred on its own half at 30% x 55% y and 70% x 55% y. Camera: Canon R5 · 50mm f/5.6 · 1/125s · ISO 200 tripod locked. Lighting: Mixed Natural + Accent both halves — attic window camera-left-back 45° 2m (key-moody on before), studio softbox camera-right 45° 1.5m (key-clean on after), 4×4ft white bounce camera-opposite 1.5m (fill each), 4×4ft black flag overhead to deepen contrast. Material physics: flaking paint micro-crack vs polished-varnish sheen, torn webbing fray vs velvet nap pile, dust mote catch vs clean sweep. Typography: 'BEFORE' top-left 12% x 10% y / 'AFTER' bottom-right 88% x 90% y, Cormorant 42pt italic tracking 80, weathered-grey-paint contrast. Color grade: Gallery Portfolio LUT grain 5 +0.1 EV. Palette: weathered-grey-paint 22%, restored-walnut-varnish 24%, upholstery-emerald 18%, attic-dust-beige 20%, studio-cream-bg 16%. References: Sotheby's restoration feature, Architectural Digest heritage, Kinfolk atelier. Exclude: mismatched silhouettes, warped lens, AI hallucination artifacts, uneven diagonal, muddy shadows.

platforms.chatgpt: Pen-and-ink botanical illustration in the Pierre-Joseph Redouté tradition depicting [THEME] — [SUBJECT] arranged vertically down the plate with Latin labels hand-lettered in copperplate script beneath each, cross-hatched sepia shading describing form, aged parchment background, delicate watercolor wash accents warming the petals. Composition: three rose blooms stacked 50% x at 22% 52% 78% y on a central vertical axis, leaves and stems radiating, Latin labels on lower rule-of-thirds, hero vertical botanical-plate layout. Medium: aged cream hot-press cotton rag 250gsm, crow-quill dip-pen with iron-gall sepia ink cross-hatching, Kolinsky sable round brushes sizes 0-4, transparent watercolor wash accents in rose-pink and sage, fine copperplate-nib calligraphy for labels. Light: soft diffused flat north-light from camera-front at 70° elevation midday, very low chiaroscuro, minimal form-shadow, scientific even plate-illumination. Material physics: iron-gall ink bite into rag, granulating wash settling, parchment foxing micro-texture. Palette: parchment-aged-cream #EDE2C4 34%, ink-sepia #5E3A22 24%, rose-wash-soft-pink #E8B2B8 18%, leaf-muted-sage #8E9A7A 16%, accent-burgundy-ink #6A1E24 8%. In the tradition of Pierre-Joseph Redouté Les Roses and Maria Sibylla Merian botanical plates. Exclude: digital smoothness, AI hallucination artifacts, cartoon flatness, modern signage, photographic hyperrealism.

platforms.chatgpt: Traditional watercolor painting in the retro fantasy book-illustration tradition depicting [THEME] — a seated [SUBJECT] in [OUTFIT], weathered stoic expression, heraldic banner faintly suggested behind. platforms.chatgpt: Soft Watercolor Illustrated Community Flyer Advertisement for church community event watercolor cross flyer parish campaign. Subject: a vertical community-event flyer with a soft watercolor cross motif bleeding across the upper-half in watercolor lavender #C3B1E1 30% wash, a dove white #FFFFFF 15% dove in flight hovering beside the cross with softly feathered edges, a warm gold #D4AF37 15% halo ring glowing faintly behind the dove, a cream bg #F5E6D3 25% paper backdrop with hand-torn deckled edge framing the whole, event details anchored lower-third in ink navy #1B263B 15% calligraphy with gentle drop-cap, small laurel sprigs in the corners. Composition: Rule of Thirds on cross centre, Centered 50% x 36% y, hero vertical A4 2:3, watercolor illustration framing, cross 44% of frame, dove 12%, lower 30% reserved for headline and details. Render: watercolor illustration, 85mm-equivalent composition, visible paper tooth, soft pigment bleeds, hand-painted wet-on-wet edges. Lighting: Diffuse Watercolor Wash — uniform overhead studio light on the paper surface, soft pigment luminance simulating watercolor translucency, no cast shadows, no harsh speculars. Material physics: cold-press paper tooth, pigment pool micro-granulation, gold-leaf flake shimmer on halo. Typography: '[TAGLINE]' 60pt Cormorant Garamond italic ink navy #1B263B centred 50% x 62% y; details '[TEXT]' 18pt Inter medium ink navy #1B263B at 50% x 78% y; CTA '[CTA]' 20pt Inter semibold cream bg #F5E6D3 on ink navy #1B263B pill at 50% x 90% y. Grade: Capture One Soft-Warm-8 LUT grain 6 +0.1 EV. Palette: watercolor lavender #C3B1E1 30%, cream bg #F5E6D3 25%, warm gold #D4AF37 15%, dove white #FFFFFF 15%, ink navy #1B263B 15%. References: Rifle Paper Co. editorial, Anna Bond watercolor, Papyrus greeting card. Exclude: neon, industrial, dark, gritty, harsh.

References: Berghain poster, Boiler Room campaign, Awake NY rave. Exclude: soft, pastel, daylight, corporate, clean.

Exclude: harsh flash, plastic skin, AI hallucination artifacts, cropped extremities, muddy shadows.

variables.name: SUBJECT
variables.default: a dignified Native American elder, 68, Southwestern ancestry, deeply lined face carrying decades of sun and wind, silver hair drawn back into two braids wrapped with woven cloth

variables.name: OUTFIT
variables.default: full ceremonial regalia styled with respect — a feather-cream #E8D8B8 naturally-dyed buckskin tunic with hand-beaded rosettes, a regalia-crimson #A8322E wool trade-blanket folded over the shoulder, a heavy hand-strung regalia-turquoise #2A8A96 and spiny-oyster squash-blossom necklace with sterling naja, coral-and-turquoise cuffs, a concho belt, a single eagle-style ceremonial feather respectfully suggested rather than isolated

variables.name: SETTING
variables.default: a high desert mesa at golden hour, desert-ochre #D8A868 sandstone tabletop ridge, sparse sagebrush, distant butte silhouettes, warm dust hanging in low light

Composition: Rule of Thirds torso 42% x 48% y, hero vertical, Eye-Level 0°, body 3/4 turned, pallu lifted gently by breeze, gaze downward reverent. Camera: Sony A7R V · 85mm f/1.8 · 1/250s · ISO 200. Lighting: Golden Hour Backlight Side Lighting + Rim Lighting — low sun camera-right-back 12° elevation 20m through pillar gap (key rim through silk), 4×4ft gold bounce camera-left 1.5m (warm fill on face), 1×3ft strip rim camera-back 30° grazing zardozi border (rim highlighting zari), 4×4ft black flag below left to deepen shadow-deep-indigo #1A2244 shade. Material physics: Banarasi silk-brocade weight and sheen, real-zari gold-thread micro-glint, lac-bangle gloss, jasmine petal matte. Color grade: Kodak Portra 400 emulation grain 6 +0.2 EV. Palette: royal-blue-silk 30%, gold-zardozi 20%, skin-warm-south-asian 20%, temple-sandstone 18%, shadow-deep-indigo 12%. References: Raghu Rai documentary, Sabyasachi campaign, Vogue India bridal. Exclude: harsh flash, plastic skin, AI hallucination artifacts, cropped extremities, muddy shadows.

platforms.chatgpt: Wide-Angle Full-Body Sports Editorial for [BRAND] performance drop. Subject: [SUBJECT], mid-stride cadence at peak drive phase, arms in counter-swing; Subsurface Scattering · Visible Pores · Fine Micro-Textures · natural capillary flush across cheekbones and temples from exertion and cool park air. Wardrobe: [OUTFIT]. Setting: [SETTING]. Composition: Rule of Thirds runner 40% x 54% y, hero vertical, Eye-Level 0°, panned 1/30s horizontal streak from legs, torso tack-sharp, gaze forward down the path. Camera: Canon R5 · 70-200mm f/2.8 at 135mm · 1/30s panned · ISO 200. Lighting: Overcast Ambient Side Lighting + Rim Lighting — diffuse sky camera-right 60° elevation (key soft), 4×4ft silver bounce camera-left 2m (fill on shadow-side arm), 1×3ft strip rim camera-back-right 30° grazing shoulders (rim), 4×4ft black flag below left to deepen tarmac. Material physics: tech-knit seamless loft, four-way stretch smooth weave, wet-asphalt specular, perforation micro-shadow. Color grade: Fuji Pro 400H emulation grain 4 +0.0 EV. Palette: gym-navy 24%, skin-athletic 22%, park-sage-blur 20%, kit-volt-yellow 18%, asphalt-grey 16%. References: Nike global campaign, Annie Leibovitz athletic, Runner's World cover. Exclude: harsh flash, plastic skin, AI hallucination artifacts, cropped extremities, muddy shadows.

platforms.chatgpt: Wide-Angle Panorama Commissioned Oil-on-Linen Painting in the [THEME] tradition, for HUDSON RIVER ATELIER. Subject: [SUBJECT], late afternoon September light, Volumetric Lighting breaking through cloud. Composition: Leading Lines along a winding silver stream curving S-shape from bottom-right toward middle distance; Rule of Thirds foreground rocky outcrop with two small-scale figures — a 19th-century surveyor in brown Merino Wool coat seated sketching on a field notebook, and a white-tailed deer half-hidden behind a birch trunk; middle-ground golden meadow #B8A36B sloping to dark pine forest; background layered Adirondack peaks receding via atmospheric perspective, storm-blue sky #4E6A8A breaking open over tallest peak to reveal sunlit ridge #E8D8A6. Canvas: Oil-on-Linen, 48×32 inch, 3:2. Technique: classical glazing layers, visible directional brushwork on foliage, impasto highlights on sunlit ridge, Claude Glass tonal range. Signature lower-right 'Hudson River Atelier · 2026' sienna thin script. Palette: deep forest #2A3D2B 32%, golden meadow #B8A36B 22%, storm-blue 18%, sunlit ridge #E8D8A6 14%, shadow umber #1A1F18 14%. References: Thomas Cole 'Oxbow' 1836, Frederic Edwin Church 'Heart of the Andes' 1859, Asher Brown Durand. Exclude: flat digital look, modern elements, oversaturation, cartoon outlines, anime style.

platforms.flux: Wide-Angle Panorama Commissioned Oil-on-Linen Painting in the [THEME] tradition, commissioned for HUDSON RIVER ATELIER. Subject: [SUBJECT] in late-afternoon September light, with Volumetric Lighting (god rays) breaking through high cumulus. Composition: Leading Lines along a winding silver stream curving in an S-shape from bottom-right toward the middle distance; Rule of Thirds foreground rocky outcrop with two small-scale narrative figures — a 19th-century surveyor in a brown Merino Wool coat seated sketching on a field notebook, and a white-tailed deer half-hidden behind a birch trunk; middle-ground golden meadow #B8A36B sloping up to a line of dark pine forest; background layered Adirondack peaks receding via atmospheric perspective, storm-blue sky #4E6A8A on the left breaking open above the tallest peak to reveal a sunlit ridge #E8D8A6. Canvas: Oil-on-Linen, 48×32 inch, 3:2 orientation. Technique: classical glazing layers, visible directional brushwork across foliage, generous impasto on the sunlit-ridge highlights, softened distant peaks via atmospheric perspective, Claude Glass compressed tonal range. Signature lower-right 'Hudson River Atelier · 2026' in sienna thin script. Palette: deep forest #2A3D2B 32%, golden meadow #B8A36B 22%, storm-blue 18%, sunlit ridge #E8D8A6 14%, shadow umber #1A1F18 14%. References: Thomas Cole 'Oxbow' 1836, Frederic Edwin Church 'Heart of the Andes' 1859, Asher Brown Durand. Exclude: flat digital look, modern elements, oversaturation, cartoon outlines, anime style.

platforms.chatgpt: Digital art painterly landscape depicting [THEME] — [SUBJECT]. Composition: Rule of Thirds horizon on upper-third at 62% y, brightest sun-glow anchored 68% x 38% y, phlox foreground sweep left-bottom, widescreen hero recession into haze, Eye-Level 0° with 2° upward tilt. Render rig: virtual 50mm f/5.6 1/125s ISO 200 landscape-painting reference, brush-stroke shader overlay, painterly atmospheric perspective. Lighting: golden-hour rim from camera-back-right 12° elevation key through low fog + gentle haze fill from sky dome + silver bounce off lake surface, no overhead. Material physics: wet-petal micro-dew, lake surface refraction and caustic ripple, mist particulate scatter, brush-impasto on shoreline foliage, soft painterly edge blur on pines. Palette: sunrise-coral #FFB4A2 30%, phlox-lavender #B8B8FF 20%, lake-teal #0E4C92 25%, mist-cream #F5E6D3 15%, forest-green #606C38 10%. Refs: Thomas Kinkade luminist dawns, Albert Bierstadt alpine vistas, Studio Ghibli lake scenes. Exclude: harsh, muddy, flat, photorealistic, cluttered.

platforms.chatgpt: [STYLE] depicting [SUBJECT]. Composition: densest bamboo cluster on left-two-thirds anchor 38% x 55% y, calligraphic column right-third, seal lower-left rule-of-thirds intersect, negative paper void upper-quarter, hero vertical scroll format. Camera: sumi-e brush on xuan rice paper, 50mm-equiv documentation lens, flat perpendicular copy-stand angle, subject fills 70% frame. Lighting: flat even studio documentation, zero shadow falloff, museum-copy-stand illumination at 90° elevation noon, low-contrast neutral presentation. Material physics: sumi ink bleed into xuan fibre, flying-white dry-brush on stalks, wet leaf pooling with grey tonal gradation, visible brush-pressure variation, vermillion seal pigment pressed into paper tooth. Palette: ink black #1A1A1A 45%, rice paper cream #F5E6D3 35%, bamboo grey-green #4A4A4A 10%, vermillion seal #D00000 7%, warm ink wash #6B6B6B 3%. In the tradition of Wen Zhengming scholar bamboo studies and Zheng Xie Qing-dynasty bamboo ink painting. Exclude: photorealistic, 3d, colorful, western, gradient.

platforms.chatgpt: Vertical 50/50 Split Wide Landscape Before/After Product Photograph for a landscape-design studio campaign titled BEFORE · AFTER GARDEN. Subject left half: a neglected [PRODUCT] with weed-overgrown-green #5A6A3A thistles, long ragged grass, mossed path-flagstone-grey #9A9488 stepping stones half-buried, splintered fence, empty flowerbeds, tangled shrubs, no face or people. Subject right half: the same garden at the same angle, season and time of day, now a manicured-lawn-sage #6E8A4E tight-mown lawn, clean flagstone path, crisp bed edges with flower-accent-magenta #C8388A cosmos and salvia, sharp topiary spheres, restored fence. Setting: [SETTING], sky-soft-blue #B8C8D4 overcast sky consistent across both halves. Composition: vertical 50/50 split, horizon at 62% y, Rule of Thirds on the path vanishing point, Eye-Level 0° wide landscape, garden filling 88% of frame. Typography: 'BEFORE' left and 'AFTER' right in Fraunces 44pt, warm-white fill with thin hairline rule between halves. Camera: Sony A7R V · 35mm f/8 · 1/250s · ISO 200. Lighting: Natural Overcast Soft Top Key + Ambient Fill — diffuse sky overhead 90° elevation (key soft), 6×6ft white scrim skyward (diffuser on both halves), 4×4ft silver bounce camera-right 3m (fill on fence), 4×4ft black flag below-front to deepen path. Material physics: lawn blade micro-specular, flagstone moss-matte vs clean-dry, foliage back-scatter, cosmos petal translucency. Color grade: Capture One Neutral-00 LUT grain 4 +0.0 EV. Palette: manicured-lawn-sage 24%, weed-overgrown-green 24%, sky-soft-blue 20%, path-flagstone-grey 18%, flower-accent-magenta 14%. References: Monty Don Gardeners' World, Piet Oudolf portfolio, Gardenista features. Exclude: cluttered props, flat lighting, plastic sheen, dust motes, text distortion.

Composition: Rule of Thirds torso 42% x 50% y, hero vertical, Eye-Level 0°, body 3/4 turned, one hand lightly holding goreum ribbon, gaze softly off-camera-left. Camera: Canon R5 · 85mm f/1.8 · 1/200s · ISO 200. Lighting: Soft Morning Courtyard Side Lighting + Rim Lighting — diffused morning sun camera-left 35° elevation through hanji paper door (key warm-diffused), 4×4ft silver bounce camera-right 1.5m (fill on face), 1×3ft strip rim camera-back-right 30° grazing chima silk (rim), 4×4ft black flag overhead to deepen rafter shade. Material physics: mulberry-silk light sheen, jacquard-chima raised weave, hanji-paper textured glow, silver bonjam specular. Color grade: Fuji Pro 400H emulation grain 4 +0.1 EV. Palette: hanbok-pink 24%, hanok-wood-brown 22%, hanbok-mint 20%, paper-door-cream 18%, skin-warm 16%. References: Kim Joong-man heritage, Vogue Korea hanbok, Leebul hanbok atelier. Exclude: harsh flash, plastic skin, AI hallucination artifacts, cropped extremities, muddy shadows.

variables.name: SUBJECT
variables.default: Korean woman 25, Seoul-Joseon lineage, glossy jet-black hair in a classic daenggi-braid tied with a hanbok-pink ribbon

variables.name: OUTFIT
variables.default: traditional two-piece hanbok — hanbok-pink #F1C6C4 mulberry-silk jeogori short jacket with hanbok-mint #A8D2C4 goreum tie-ribbon and contrasting cuffs, dongjeong white collar band, long high-waisted chima full skirt in hanbok-mint with subtle floral jacquard, beoseon white socks, flower-embroidered kkotsin court slippers, small norigae tassel with silver bonjam hanging from the jeogori

variables.name: SETTING
variables.default: Bukchon Hanok Village courtyard, traditional hanok-wood-brown #8A5E3E post-and-beam architecture with paper-door-cream #F2E8D0 hanji sliding doors, gray giwa tiled roof sloping above, a low stone step, a brass jangdokdae urn in the background

platforms.chatgpt: Futuristic Explorer on Alien World, sci-fi cinematic widescreen 16:9 key-visual. Subject: [SUBJECT] walking in slow purpose past [SETTING], her [OUTFIT] catching both suns, short windswept hair, calm lifted gaze, faint footprint trail behind, drifting rust-fine dust. Composition: Rule of Thirds on figure at right-third, wide Eye-Level 0° with subtle 3° horizon cant, figure 28% frame scale dwarfed by monoliths, horizon at 40% y twin-sun twilight backdrop. Camera: ARRI Alexa 65 · Prime DNA 50mm T1.9 · cinematic shallow mid-DOF. Lighting: Cinematic Rim + Key — primary magenta-glow sun key camera-back-left 12° 6m as warm rim along cape and helm, secondary cooler sun fill camera-right 20° 5m softens indigo shadow side, no overhead. Skin physics: Subsurface Scattering · Visible Pores · Fine Micro-Textures · natural capillary flush across cheek and brow. Color grade: Villeneuve Dune warm-indigo split LUT, grain 5. Palette: chrome-silver-attire #C4C8D0 22% / alien-rust-ground #A8583A 28% / monolith-shadow-indigo #1E1A34 22% / twin-sun-magenta-glow #E2668A 14% / skin-warm #E0B896 14%. Refs: Syd Mead, Denis Villeneuve Dune 2021, Moebius. Exclude: flat lighting, plastic skin, cluttered props, cartoon outlines, muddy shadows.

platforms.chatgpt: Dynamic Ink Splash Warrior, sumi-e ink illustration 3:4 editorial cover. Subject: [SUBJECT] mid-lunge with long straight sword, body torqued in explosive diagonal, [OUTFIT] sleeves trailing ink-streak ribbons, expressive crimson and black ink splatters fanning from her blade path, bold gestural brush strokes defining shoulder and thigh, hair lashing across face, rice-paper substrate with natural fibre texture visible through washes. Composition: Rule of Thirds on blade tip, diagonal slash composition from lower-left to upper-right, Low-Mid Angle 7°, subject 75% frame, splash halo negative space around body. Render: sumi-e × Hyung-Tae Kim × James Jean hybrid, wet-on-wet bleed edges, dry-brush chisel strokes, calligraphic line weight variation, spot-crimson accents. Lighting: Cinematic Rim + Key — implied warm key from upper-left 35° via bright paper negative space acting as back-light, implied rim along blade edge as pure cream halo, shadow-ink-grey as ambient occlusion, no literal skin physics (ink illustration). Color grade: sumi wash LUT, grain 0 (paper tooth only). Palette: ink-black #0C0C0E 32% / splash-crimson-red #B8222A 24% / hair-vermilion #C84028 16% / rice-paper-cream #EEE2C8 20% / shadow-ink-grey #5A5A5E 8%. Refs: Yoji Shinkawa, James Jean, Takato Yamamoto. Exclude: flat lighting, plastic textures, cluttered props, cartoon outlines, photographic skin.
